statement: In every magma, Equation 3171 (`x = (((y * y) * z) * w) * x`) implies Equation 2909 (`x = ((y * (x * y)) * x) * x`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0802
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op (op y y) z) w) x)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y (op x y)) x) x)
